description: Trigger SDK regeneration on @ama-sdk update, with optional private registry authentication. When registry args are provided, configures npm user-level config (~/.npmrc) on the Renovate runner so install and SDK migration can authenticate against a private registry. arg0: package manager (yarn, npm). arg1: (optional) scheme-less registry URL with trailing slash (e.g. '//npm.my-company.example/api/npm/npm/'). arg2: (optional) name of the environment variable holding the base64-encoded token (e.g. 'NPM_AUTH_BASE64'); must be exposed to Renovate via customEnvVariables. When arg1/arg2 are empty, no authentication is configured. Only supported for npm and Yarn 1; for Yarn 2+, configure hostRules (see https://docs.renovatebot.com/getting-started/private-packages/#yarn-2).
